parameters.query:
WITH movimientos AS (
  SELECT
    cm.cash_session_id,
    COALESCE(pm.name, 'Sin método') AS payment_method,
    cm.currency,
    SUM(CASE WHEN (cm.type = 'INFLOW' OR cm.type = 'income') AND cm.source_type != 'opening' THEN cm.amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_ingresos,
    SUM(CASE WHEN cm.type = 'expense' THEN cm.amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_egresos,
    COUNT(cm.id) AS num_movimientos
  FROM cash_movements cm
  LEFT JOIN payment_methods pm ON pm.id = cm.payment_method_id
  WHERE ($5::integer = -1 OR cm.payment_method_id = $5::integer)
    AND ($6 = 'all'
         OR ($6 = 'ingresos' AND (cm.type = 'INFLOW' OR cm.type = 'income') AND cm.source_type != 'opening')
         OR ($6 = 'egresos' AND cm.type = 'expense'))
  GROUP BY cm.cash_session_id, pm.name, cm.currency
)
SELECT
  cs.id AS session_id,
  cs.opened_at,
  cs.closed_at,
  cs.status,
  u.name AS cashier_name,
  cp.name AS cash_point_name,
  m.payment_method,
  m.currency,
  COALESCE(m.total_ingresos, 0) AS total_ingresos,
  COALESCE(m.total_egresos, 0) AS total_egresos,
  COALESCE(m.num_movimientos, 0) AS num_movimientos
FROM cash_sessions cs
JOIN users u ON u.id = cs.user_id
JOIN cash_points cp ON cp.id = cs.cash_point_id
LEFT JOIN movimientos m ON m.cash_session_id = cs.id
WHERE cs.opened_at::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  AND ($3::integer = -1 OR cs.cash_point_id = $3::integer)
  AND ($4 = 'all' OR m.currency = $4::varchar)
ORDER BY cs.opened_at DESC, m.payment_method

SELECT
  p.id,
  p.doc_no,
  p.payment_date,
  u.name AS patient_name,
  u.phone_number,
  COALESCE(pm.name, 'Sin método') AS payment_method,
  p.amount_applied AS amount,
  p.source_currency AS currency,
  COALESCE(p.exchange_rate, 1) AS exchange_rate,
  p.transaction_type,
  p.status,
  p.notes
FROM payments p
JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id
LEFT JOIN payment_methods pm ON pm.id = p.payment_method_id
WHERE p.payment_date::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  AND p.is_sales = true
  AND p.status = 'completed'
  AND ($3::integer IS NULL OR p.payment_method_id = $3::integer)
  AND ($4::varchar IS NULL OR p.source_currency = $4::varchar)
ORDER BY p.payment_date DESC

SELECT
  u.id,
  u.name           AS patient_name,
  u.phone_number,
  u.email,
  COALESCE(SUM(i.total), 0)                              AS total_invoiced,
  COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(i.paid_amount, 0)), 0)           AS total_paid,
  COALESCE(SUM(i.total - COALESCE(i.paid_amount, 0)), 0) AS saldo
FROM users u
JOIN invoices i ON i.user_id = u.id
  AND i.is_sales = true
  AND i.currency = $1::varchar
  AND i.status = 'booked'
  AND i.type = 'invoice'
WHERE u.is_sales = true
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.phone_number, u.email
HAVING (
  $2::text = 'all'
  OR ($2::text = 'con_deuda' AND SUM(i.total - COALESCE(i.paid_amount, 0)) > 0)
  OR ($2::text = 'al_dia'   AND SUM(i.total - COALESCE(i.paid_amount, 0)) <= 0)
)
ORDER BY saldo DESC, total_invoiced DESC

SELECT
  q.id,
  q.doc_no,
  q.created_at,
  u.name AS patient_name,
  u.phone_number,
  q.total,
  q.currency,
  q.status,
  q.billing_status,
  CURRENT_DATE - q.created_at::date AS days_pending
FROM quotes q
JOIN users u ON u.id = q.user_id
WHERE q.is_sales = true
  AND q.status IN ('confirmed', 'draft', 'rejected')
  AND q.created_at::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  AND ($3::varchar IS NULL OR q.status = $3::varchar)
  AND ($4::numeric IS NULL OR q.total >= $4::numeric)
  AND ($5::varchar IS NULL OR q.currency = $5::varchar)
ORDER BY q.created_at DESC

meta.notes:
BLOQUE 1 - OPERACIONAL
R-01: GET /reports/cierre-caja?date_from=YYYY-MM-DD&date_to=YYYY-MM-DD&cash_point_id=&currency=
R-02: GET /reports/cobros-dia?date_from=YYYY-MM-DD&date_to=YYYY-MM-DD&payment_method_id=&currency=
R-03: GET /reports/cuentas-corrientes?currency=UYU&min_amount=
R-04: GET /reports/presupuestos-pendientes?date_from=YYYY-MM-DD&date_to=YYYY-MM-DD&status=&min_amount=

CONFIGURACIÓN:
1. Crear credencial Postgres en n8n.
2. Reemplazar POSTGRES_CREDENTIAL_ID con el ID real.
3. Activar el workflow.
